description: For over 25 years, Sterling & Associates has been the trusted legal counsel for individuals and businesses across the state.

hero.heading: Justice. Integrity. Results.
hero.subheading: For over 25 years, Sterling & Associates has been the trusted legal counsel for individuals and businesses across the state. We fight relentlessly to protect your rights.

services.title: Corporate Law
services.description: Comprehensive legal counsel for businesses of all sizes, from formation and governance to mergers, acquisitions, and compliance.

services.title: Family Law
services.description: Compassionate yet determined advocacy in divorce, custody, adoption, and all matters affecting your family's future.

services.title: Criminal Defense
services.description: Aggressive defense strategies protecting your freedom and reputation. Every case receives our full attention and resources.

services.title: Real Estate Law
services.description: Expert guidance through complex real estate transactions, disputes, zoning matters, and property development.

services.title: Employment Law
services.description: Protecting the rights of employees and employers in workplace disputes, discrimination claims, and contract negotiations.

services.title: Personal Injury
services.description: Maximizing your compensation for injuries caused by negligence. No fees unless we win your case.

about.heading: A Legacy of Legal Excellence
about.text: Founded in 1999 by Jonathan Sterling, our firm has grown from a small practice into one of the most respected legal institutions in the state. We believe every client deserves exceptional legal representation, regardless of the complexity of their case. Our attorneys combine decades of courtroom experience with a genuine commitment to our clients' well-being.

values.title: Excellence
values.description: We pursue the highest standard in every case, every brief, and every courtroom appearance.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: Honest counsel and transparent communication form the foundation of our practice.

values.title: Dedication
values.description: We treat every case as if it were our own, fighting tirelessly for our clients.

values.title: Results
values.description: Our track record speaks for itself — over 5,000 successful case outcomes.

team.name: Jonathan Sterling
team.title: Founding Partner
team.bio: Harvard Law '94. Over 30 years in corporate litigation with a record of landmark victories.

team.name: Victoria Chen
team.title: Senior Partner, Family Law
team.bio: Recognized as a Top 50 Family Law Attorney. Passionate advocate for children's rights.

team.name: Marcus Thompson
team.title: Partner, Criminal Defense
team.bio: Former federal prosecutor. 15 years of trial experience with a 96% acquittal rate.

team.name: Elena Rodriguez
team.title: Partner, Personal Injury
team.bio: Recovered over $200M for clients. Named to Super Lawyers list 8 consecutive years.

results.description: Settlement for a client injured in a commercial vehicle accident involving corporate negligence.
Full acquittal in a high-profile federal fraud case with 47 counts dismissed.
Class action verdict for workplace discrimination affecting 200+ employees.
Recovery in a complex commercial property dispute involving breach of contract.

testimonials.quote: Sterling & Associates didn't just win my case — they gave me my life back. Jonathan and his team were available around the clock and never wavered in their commitment.
testimonials.author: Robert M.

testimonials.quote: When our company faced a complex merger challenge, Victoria's expertise and strategic thinking saved us millions. I wouldn't trust anyone else with our legal matters.
testimonials.author: Sarah K.

testimonials.quote: Marcus Thompson is the reason I'm a free man today. His courtroom presence is unmatched, and his preparation is meticulous. Truly the best defense attorney in the state.
testimonials.author: David L.

cta.heading: Schedule Your Free Consultation
